creator: o.hushchenkov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Kevin Zheng from comment #19)
This is anticipated feature. The patch is small and can't break anything.

Better to support some hardware than not to support anything, acpi_ibm already lacks support for modern ThinkPads.

There are ThinkPads based on AMD chips in the market, without ME. I saw reports that on T495 this method still works.
